title: Anthropic Files Record IPO as Google Raises $80B - TCR 06/02/26
description:
Alphabet moved to raise $80 billion including a $10 billion block to Berkshire Hathaway, Anthropic filed confidentially for what could be the largest IPO ever days after a $965 billion valuation, and hackers talked Meta's own AI support assistant into handing over high-profile Instagram accounts including the Obama White House handle.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-june-2-2026/

0:00 Alphabet $80B raise and Anthropic record IPO filing
1:50 The Same Race to the Same Door
5:31 Meta's AI support assistant exploited to hijack Instagram accounts
8:40 Six years of records show China's military sought restricted Nvidia chips
13:39 MIT ultrasound sticker paces the heart without surgery
15:59 Close

This episode covers the Alphabet $80B equity raise and Anthropic record IPO filing, the $250B "AI GDP" estimate growing 2,600% a year, the Meta AI support assistant Instagram exploit, six years of records showing China's military openly seeking restricted Nvidia chips, the New York Fed remote-work vs AI graduate-unemployment study, and the MIT non-invasive ultrasound heart sticker.

The headlining story is the capital itself: two of the largest raises in history landing in one cycle to fund the physical substrate of frontier intelligence, on the wager that the advantage the money buys holds long enough to repay it. Underneath it, economists estimate an AI economy near $250 billion in 2025 growing thousands of percent a year yet nearly invisible in official statistics, because the cost of any capability falls almost as fast as supply rises. The same week, capability keeps moving outward: Nvidia's RTX Spark puts agents on laptops and Intel readies a cheaper air-cooled inference chip, routing around the chokehold the fresh capital depends on. Friction sharpens the picture - Meta's support assistant talked into surrendering accounts, a six-year record of China's military buying around an export gate, and a New York Fed study naming remote work, not AI, as the main driver of recent-graduate unemployment. And MIT demonstrated a postage-stamp ultrasound sticker that corrected arrhythmias in animals and engineered human cardiac cells, moving cardiac care off the operating table.
